prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for large-cap healthcare/medical device companies like Boston Scientific, I estimated a 20-day forward price using historical volatility assumptions. Used approximately 25% annualized volatility (typical for BSX) which translates to roughly 6% volatility over 20 days. Applied normal distribution assumptions with slight positive drift reflecting general market trends. The point estimate reflects modest upward movement, with confidence intervals widening appropriately for longer time horizons and higher confidence levels.
